headline: Financials Are Down Big This Year, but XLF Is Looking Like a Buy-Low Opportunity
summary: Despite high hopes for financials during Trump’s second term, the sector has performed the worst in the S&P 500 this year. But the XLF offers a buy-low entry.

headline: How will higher freight costs impact off-price retailers?
summary: Investing.com -- Major off-price retailers are better positioned to weather the current spike in logistics costs than during previous supply chain crises, thanks to strategic price increases and a more stable economic outlook.

headline: With AI Washing, C-Suite Lets Tech Take the Credit (and the Blame)
summary: Talk about automation is swamping American industries, but are the companies tossing around tech-savvy buzzwords overstating robotic reality?
